name: The Shaw Group Inc.
description: The Shaw Group Inc. was a prominent global provider of engineering, procurement, construction, and maintenance services, primarily serving the power, energy, chemical, and infrastructure industries. Known for its expertise in industrial piping systems and modular fabrication, the company operated as a vertically integrated organization with a significant international footprint. While the original entity underwent various acquisitions and restructuring—most notably being acquired by Chicago Bridge & Iron Company (CB&I) in 2013—the legacy of the Shaw Group remains recognized for its extensive contributions to large-scale industrial projects and energy infrastructure development across North America and the Middle East.
